name: Text Analysis
input: It takes directory or path as an input
output: Outputs a Dataframe with 2 columns speaker and dialouge

fields.name: isWordCloud
fields.title: Word Cloud
fields.description: Enable generation of a word cloud visualization to highlight frequently occurring terms in the analyzed text.

fields.name: selectedAnalysis
fields.title: Analysis Type
fields.description: Select the type of linguistic or emotional analysis to perform on the input text.

fields.name: llmConnection
fields.title: Select Connection
fields.description: Select the configured OpenAI connection containing API credentials and model access settings.

fields.name: openaiModel
fields.title: OpenAI Model
fields.description: OpenAI language model used to perform the selected text analysis task.
